titleStmt.title: SII 28.22: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 22. (A.R. No. 22 of 1913.) ĀḌUTUṞAI, PERAMBALUR TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: Aparādhakshamēśvara Temple-Central Shrine, north and west wall.

The scribe of this record seems to have been in doubt about the succession title of the king, whether it was Parakēsari or Rājakēsari. He started with Pa but continued to write Rāsa. The king of the record is Parakēsarivarman is well indicated as it is prefaced with the mey-kkīrtti of Rājarāja II, beginning with Pū-maruviya.

It records the endowment of 60 kāśu by one Āḷichem ••• da-rāja •• vāḷān as ubhayam for God Tirukkuraṇgkāḍutuṟai-uḍaiya-Mādēvar in biramadēyam Iṟaiyān-puṉchai in Ugaḷūṟ-kūṟṟam in Muḍikoṇḍa-chōḷavaḷanāḍu. The kāśu was converted into paddy and with the interest in paddy on that capital, the expenses on the services to the God on every amāvāsyā day (?) and on the payment of fees to those serving the God were fixed to be met. To this effect the undertaking was given by three śivabrāhmaṇas (one of whom was the same as the one figuring in No. 16, 19 and 20 above) and the ugachchan.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmaruviya tirumātum puvimātuñ cayamātum nāmaruviya kalaimātum pukaḻmātum nayantu pulka Arumaṟai vitiṉeṟiyayaṉait
tuntaḻaippa varumoṟai Urimaiyil maṇimuṭi cūṭit tiṅkaḷ veṇkuṭaitticaik kaḷi ṟeṭṭun taṅku taṉikkuṭaitāṉena viḷaṅka karuṅka
lip paṭṭiyaic ceṅkol turappa poruṅ katirāḻi pulivaḷaintuṭaṉ vara villavar Iraṭṭar miṉavar
ciṅkaṇar pallava nutaliyar pārttivar paṇiya Eṇṇaruṅ kaṟpaka viṇṇakam puṇarntu cempoṉ viraciṅ kācanattu puvaṉa muḻu
tuṭaiyāḷorum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya koparācakecari panmarāṉa tiripuvaṉacakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājarājatevaṟku yāṇṭu Eṭṭā
vatu muṭikoṇṭacoḻavaḷaṉāṭṭu Ukaḷūṟ kūṟṟattu piramateyam Iṟaiyāṉpuṉcai tirukkuraṅkāṭu tuṟai Uṭai
ya mātevarkku Āḷi cem tarāca veḷāṉa paiyum vaitta kācu
Aṟupatukku Aṉṟāṭu vilaippaṭi Iṭṭa Akkattāl mutalāṉa nel nūṟṟuṉāṟpattu tu kku Ikalattu
mukkuṟuṇiyāka polinta palicaiyāl mutalāṉa Indhakā til Amāvāci Oṉṟukku Amutupaṭi Arici Aiṅku ṟuṇikku Ira
ṇṭañcākki nel kalaṉe ṉāṉāḻiyuṅ kaṟi Amutu nāṟpatin palattukku nel ṉāṉāḻiyum Uppamutuḻakkukku miḷakamutu Āḻākkukku nel Aṟu
ṉāḻiyun tayiramutu Irunāḻikku ṉellu ṉāṉāḻiyum ney Uḻakkukku ṉellaṟuṉāḻiyum pākku nāṟpatukkum Ilaiyamutu kaṭṭu Oṉṟukkum
ṉellaṟu ṉāḻiyum pūcikku ṉampiyāṟku ṉellu kuṟuṇiyum vāca kā kku nellu patakkut tiruppaḷḷit tāmam paṟippāṉu
kku nellu kuṟuṇiyun tiruviti paṇi ceyvār muvarkku nellu patakku ṉāṉāḻiyum viḷakku Eṇṇai Aṟuṉāḻikku nel lirutūṇikkuṟu
ṇiyum panta viḷakku piṭittu Iṭṭu Eṇṇai vārppāṉukku ṉe lu kuṟuṇiyum Uvacca Āḷ nālvarkku nellu tūṇiyum Ippaṭi Ā
l nellu mukkalamum Amāvāci toṟuñ celuttak vomākavum Ikkoyilukku kuṭamum Alakuṅ ke
Ivvupaiyañ celuttakkaṭavaṉākavum Eḻuntaruḷa Amutu ceytaruḷiṉāl caṭṭipaṭaittu Intanmañ cey tarāja veḷā
ṉ piracātappaṭu Eṉṟu kuṭuppakkaṭavomākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu Upayaṅ koṇṭom Ikkoyilil civappirā
maṇar pāratāyaṉ rājajiṅka mātevatāṉaRead rājaciṅkamātevaṉāṉa dakṣaṇāmūrtti paṇṭitaṉum pālāciriyaṉ piccaṉ poruḷāṉa ṇāirapaṭṭanu
m pālāciriyaṉ Āticcan kuṟṟam poṟuttānāṉa tirucciṟṟampala paṭṭaṉum Ukaccaṉum Ittanmam panmāhe[ śvara] rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 28.22 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
